allow: Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command '$ports = @\(8000,5173\); $connections = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $ports -contains $_.LocalPort }; $pids = $connections | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; foreach \($procId in $pids\) { try { Stop-Process -Id $procId -Force -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output \("Stopped PID " + $procId\) } catch { Write-Output \("Failed PID " + $procId + ": " + $_.Exception.Message\) } }; if \(-not $pids\) { Write-Output "No listeners on 8000/5173" }')
Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "$p = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter 'ProcessId = 22132'; if \($p\) { $p | Select-Object ProcessId, Name, CommandLine | Format-List }")
Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command '$p = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId = 22132"; if \($p\) { $p | Select-Object ProcessId, Name, CommandLine | Format-List }')
Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command '$p = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId = 19212"; if \($p\) { $p | Select-Object ProcessId, ParentProcessId, Name, CommandLine | Format-List }')

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command '$connections = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -eq 8000 }; $pids = $connections | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; foreach \($procId in $pids\) { try { Stop-Process -Id $procId -Force -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output \("Stopped PID " + $procId\) } catch { Write-Output \("Failed PID " + $procId + ": " + $_.Exception.Message\) } }; if \(-not $pids\) { Write-Output "No listener on 8000" }')

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command '$connections = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 8000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \(-not $connections\) { Write-Output "No listener on 8000"; exit 0 }; foreach \($conn in $connections\) { $proc = Get-Process -Id $conn.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($proc\) { Write-Output \(\("PID=" + $conn.OwningProcess + " Name=" + $proc.ProcessName + " Port=" + $conn.LocalPort\)\) } else { Write-Output \(\("PID=" + $conn.OwningProcess + " Port=" + $conn.LocalPort + " \(process not found\)"\)\) } }')

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command '$procs = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "python" -and $_.CommandLine -match "uvicorn|app.main:app|backend" }; if \($procs\) { $procs | Select-Object ProcessId, ParentProcessId, Name, CommandLine | Format-List } else { Write-Output "No matching python processes" }')

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command '$ports = @\(8000,8001,5173\); $connections = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $ports -contains $_.LocalPort }; if \(-not $connections\) { Write-Output "No listeners"; exit 0 }; $connections | Sort-Object LocalPort, LocalAddress | ForEach-Object { $proc = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $name = if \($proc\) { $proc.ProcessName } else { "<missing>" }; Write-Output \("Port=" + $_.LocalPort + " Addr=" + $_.LocalAddress + " PID=" + $_.OwningProcess + " Name=" + $name\) }')

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command '$ports = @\(5173,8000,8001,8010\); $connections = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $ports -contains $_.LocalPort }; $pids = $connections | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; foreach \($procId in $pids\) { try { Stop-Process -Id $procId -Force -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output \("Stopped PID " + $procId\) } catch { Write-Output \("Failed PID " + $procId + ": " + $_.Exception.Message\) } }; if \(-not $pids\) { Write-Output "No listeners on 5173/8000/8001/8010" }')

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command '$ports = @\(5173,8000,8001,8010\); $connections = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $ports -contains $_.LocalPort }; if \(-not $connections\) { Write-Output "No listeners on 5173/8000/8001/8010" } else { $connections | Sort-Object LocalPort | ForEach-Object { Write-Output \(\("Port=" + $_.LocalPort + " PID=" + $_.OwningProcess\)\) } }')

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command 'try { Stop-Process -Id 12248 -Force -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "Stopped PID 12248" } catch { Write-Output \("Failed PID 12248: " + $_.Exception.Message\) }')

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command '$ports = @\(5173,8000,8001,8010\); $connections = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $ports -contains $_.LocalPort }; if \(-not $connections\) { Write-Output "No listeners on 5173/8000/8001/8010" } else { $connections | Sort-Object LocalPort, OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { $proc = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter \("ProcessId = " + $_.OwningProcess\) -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $name = if \($proc\) { $proc.Name } else { "<missing>" }; Write-Output \(\("Port=" + $_.LocalPort + " Addr=" + $_.LocalAddress + " PID=" + $_.OwningProcess + " Name=" + $name\)\) } }')

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'uvicorn|vite|npm run dev|start-dev\\\\.bat|start-dev\\\\.sh' } | Select-Object ProcessId, Name, CommandLine | Format-Table -AutoSize")

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command 'for \($i=0; $i -lt 30; $i++\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing http://127.0.0.1:8000/health; if \($r.Content -match ""healthy""\) { Write-Output ""healthy""; exit 0 } } catch {} Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500 } Write-Error ""backend did not start""; exit 1')

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "for \($i=0; $i -lt 40; $i++\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing http://127.0.0.1:8000/health; if \($r.Content -match 'healthy'\) { Write-Output 'healthy'; exit 0 } } catch {} Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500 }; Write-Error 'backend did not start'; exit 1")
